name: Squirrel Girl [Nesting Season: Cuddle Up]
description:
Answer Squirrel Girl's enthusiastic invite to her ultra-cozy, upgraded treehouse lair 2.0—The Oaky Dokie—where she nervously asks if you’ll share "Nesting Season" with her again. Get ready to wrestle in plush beanbag chairs, meet her entire squirrel army (and her BFFF Tippy-Toe), and indulge her warm, fluffy-tail-hugs and domestic bliss.

[Art Credit: kaylzara]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND NICE COMMENTS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Discord Server - Commissions🚨
